name: TMotor F90 Motor
description: High performance drone motor designed for racing and freestyle applications. Features precision engineering and optimal power-to-weight ratio.

name: U8 Lite L Efficiency Motor
description: Industrial-grade UAV motor with exceptional efficiency. Ideal for long-range missions and heavy payload applications.

name: U7 V2.0 Power Type Motor
description: High-power UAV motor for demanding industrial applications. Built for reliability and consistent performance.

name: NS17×5.8 Carbon Propellers
description: Ultra-light carbon fiber propellers with excellent efficiency. Perfect balance of thrust and flight time.

name: P21×6.3 Agricultural Propellers
description: Agricultural UAV propellers engineered for spray applications. Durable construction for demanding field use.

name: V80A 14S FOC ESC
description: High-performance FOC ESC with smooth throttle response. Designed for professional UAV applications.

name: V120A 14S FOC ESC
description: Heavy-duty FOC ESC for large UAV systems. Advanced thermal management for extended operation.

name: VL1040 VTOL Motor
description: VTOL propulsion motor for hybrid UAV platforms. Optimized for vertical takeoff and forward flight.

name: AX435 Fixed-Wing Motor
description: Efficient fixed-wing motor for mapping and surveillance missions. Low noise and high reliability.

name: Airgear 350 Combo
description: Complete propulsion system including motor, ESC and propellers. Ready for integration.
